findings.title: No React Error Boundary - component crash kills entire app
No timeout on Gemini LLM calls (can hang indefinitely)
Retry logic missing on all API calls
IndexedDB queue has no size limit (can exhaust storage)
Sync failures silently swallowed
No exponential backoff on retries
